# External Sources — Topic 1.1: Developments in East Asia

## Khan Academy
- Article: East Asia 1200-1450
- URL: https://www.khanacademy.org/humanities/world-history-project-ap/xb41992e0ff5e0f09:unit-1-the-global-tapestry/xb41992e0ff5e0f09:1-2developments-in-asia/a/read-east-asia-1200-1450

## Fiveable
